channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ORIENTTECH] Orient Technologies Ltd Closes Trading Window Under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Orient Technologies Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the announcement of the audited financial results of the Company for the same quarter. The decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company's Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Insiders.

  • Orient Technologies Ltd closes trading window under SEBI regulations for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the announcement of audited financial results.
  • The decision is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and other Insiders of the Company are advised not to deal in the Equity Shares of the Company during the closure period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Orient Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDBNK] Trading Window Closure Announced by Ind Bank Housing Ltd for Directors and Designated Persons
item.description:
Ind Bank Housing Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealings in listed securities (Shares) of the Company. The closure is in accordance with SEBI (Clause 4(2) of the Schedule B of Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 as amended. The trading window will be closed from 1st April 2026 for Directors/Designated Persons and their immediate relatives of the Company till expiry of forty-eight hours after declaration of Audited financial results by the Company for the year ended 31st March 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for considering the audited financial results of the Company for the year ended 31st March 2026 is yet to be intimated.

  • Ind Bank Housing Ltd announces closure of trading window for dealings in listed securities
  • Closure is in accordance with SEBI regulations
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April 2026
  • Closure for Directors/Designated Persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure till expiry of forty-eight hours after declaration of Audited financial results for the year ended 31st March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IND BANK HOUSING LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ADCINDIA] ADC India Communications Ltd. to Approve Q4 and FY26 Financial Results on May 21, 2026; Trading Window Closed
item.description:
ADC India Communications Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. In accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and the Company’s Code of Conduct, the Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the Company by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives will be closed from April 1, 2026, till May 23, 2026.

  • ADC India Communications Ltd. to approve Q4 and FY26 financial results on May 21, 2026
  • Trading Window closed for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, to May 23, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADC India Communications Limited-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NDRAUTO] NDR Auto Components Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
NDR Auto Components Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all Designated Persons, Connected Persons, and Insiders as per the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the announcement of audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board meeting will be intimated in due course.

  • NDR Auto Components Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for Designated Persons, Connected Persons, and Insiders.
  • The closure is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the announcement of audited Financial Results for the year ending on March 31, 2026.
  • The date of the Board meeting will be intimated in due course.
  • This announcement is made in accordance with the Company’s ‘Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information and Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Insiders’.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NDR Auto Components Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ADCINDIA] ADC India Communications Ltd. to Approve Q4 & FY26 Financial Results on May 21, 2026
item.description:
ADC India Communications Ltd. has scheduled a Board Meeting on May 21, 2026 to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the Company by Designated Persons and their immediate relatives will remain closed from April 1, 2026 till May 23, 2026, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015 and the Company’s Code of Conduct.

  • ADC India Communications Ltd. to approve Q4 and FY26 financial results on May 21, 2026.
  • Trading Window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives to be closed from April 1, 2026 to May 23, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADC India Communications Limited-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDIANHUME] Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for promoters, promoter group, directors, designated persons, connected persons, and their relatives. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending 31st March, 2026. The date of the board meeting will be communicated in due course.

  • Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd has closed its trading window for promoters, promoter group, directors, designated persons, connected persons, and their relatives.
  • The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026.
  • The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending 31st March, 2026.
  • The date of the board meeting to discuss the financial results will be communicated in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN HUME PIPE CO.LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHRIPISTON] Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The trading window will be closed from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited (standalone and consolidated) financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. This decision has been made to ensure compliance with insider trading regulations and to maintain transparency.

  • Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd closes trading window in accordance with SEBI regulations and company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.
  • Trading window to remain closed from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of Q4 and FY26 financial results.
  • Decision aims to ensure compliance with insider trading regulations and maintain transparency.
  • Audited (standalone and consolidated) financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026, to be declared in the ensuing Board Meeting.
  • Announcement placed on the company’s website at www.shrirampistons.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BRAWN] Brawn Biotech Ltd Closes Trading Window from 01st April 2026 till 48 hours after Q4 & FY26 Results
item.description:
Brawn Biotech Ltd has announced the closure of the Trading Window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives from 01st April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. Insiders are advised not to deal in securities of the Company during the closure of the Trading Window. The date of the Board meeting for result declaration will be intimated in due course.

  • Brawn Biotech Ltd closes Trading Window from 01st April 2026 till 48 hours after Q4 & FY26 results
  • Closure in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders
  • Trading Window closure effective from 01 April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited financial results for Q4 & FY26
  • Insiders advised not to deal in securities of the Company during the closure of the Trading Window
  • Date of Board meeting for result declaration to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BRAWN BIOTECH LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GESHIP] Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd Receives ESG Score of 69.3 from SES ESG
item.description:
SES ESG Research Private Limited, a SEBI registered ESG Rating provider, has assigned an overall Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) score of 69.3 to the Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd. The Company has not engaged SES ESG for ESG Rating, but the rating has been independently assigned based on publicly available data. This is a significant recognition for the Company's efforts towards ESG practices.

  • SES ESG Research Private Limited has assigned an overall ESG score of 69.3 to Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd
  • The rating is based on publicly available data
  • The Company has not engaged SES ESG for ESG Rating
  • This recognition highlights the Company's commitment towards ESG practices

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GREAT EASTERN SHIPPING CO.LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [GESHIP] GE Shipping Delivers 2002 Built Very Large Gas Carrier 'Jag Vishnu', Fleet Now Stands at 40 Vessels
item.description:
The Great Eastern Shipping Company Limited (GE Shipping) has successfully delivered its 2002 built Very Large Gas Carrier 'Jag Vishnu' to the buyers. The vessel was contracted for sale in Q3 FY26. This transaction brings the company's current owned fleet to 40 vessels, including 26 Tankers and 14 Dry Bulk Carriers, with a total dwt of 3.20 mn. Furthermore, the company has contracted to buy one secondhand Kamsarmax Dry Bulk Carrier, expected to be completed by Q1 FY27.

  • GE Shipping delivers its 2002 built Very Large Gas Carrier 'Jag Vishnu' to the buyers.
  • The vessel was contracted for sale in Q3 FY26.
  • GE Shipping's current owned fleet now stands at 40 vessels, comprising 26 Tankers and 14 Dry Bulk Carriers.
  • The total dwt of the fleet is 3.20 mn.
  • GE Shipping has contracted to buy one secondhand Kamsarmax Dry Bulk Carrier, expected to be completed by Q1 FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GREAT EASTERN SHIPPING CO.LTD. | Category: Sale
